description: Machine-readable mapping between tool-policy abstract capabilities, allowlist actions, and workflow execution verbs for ops.
validationRules: Every workflow action verb used by ops-owned workflows must map to at least one abstract capability.
Every ops abstract capability used in tool-policy must map to allowlist actions or explicit read-only semantics.
When an abstract capability maps to allowlist actions, allowlist must contain at least one enabled rule for that action.
